examples: He pulled into the driveway in front of her garage.
You can't park here, you're obstructing my driveway.
I was running down the driveway to the car and I lost my balance.
The secluded compound is tucked behind gates, situated at the end of a winding 1, 800-foot-long driveway.
We live in a rural area, up a gravel driveway with two homes on it.
